parameters.query:
UPDATE member_agreements
SET
  status = COALESCE($3, status),
  updated_at = now(),
  signed_at = CASE WHEN $3 = 'signed' THEN COALESCE(signed_at, now()) ELSE signed_at END
WHERE (documenso_document_id = $1::bigint AND $1::bigint <> 0)
   OR (documenso_external_id = $2 AND $2 IS NOT NULL);
